Listing.title: Listing
Listing.description: Vinted listing item including its details, physical warehouse placement, status and sales transaction details.

listing_price.description: Expected retail sale price of the item.

storage_location.description: Physical box, row, or rack where the item is stored.

created_at.description: ISO String representation of creation time.

sold_at.description: ISO String of sold transaction execution.

listings/{listingId}.description: A collection containing all Vinted system inventory records
